titleStmt.title: SII 36.108: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 108. (A.R. No. 108 of 1910.) TIRUMĀḶAM (Kōviltirumāḷam), NANNILAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the north wall of the first prākāra in the Māgāḷēśvara temple.

summary.p: Pōndaikkuḍaiyāṉ Tiruvēgambamuḍaiyāṉ Nīṟaṇindān, a śrīkāriyam officer of the temple assigned six nāḻis of paddy for providing sacred food to the processional deity, Āṭkoṇḍa Nāyakar of the temple of Tirumāgāḷamuḍaiyār at Ambar when the image was taken to the tirumaḍaiviḷāgam on Sundays.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
... § svastiśrī kopparakecaripanmarāṉa cakkaravattikaḷ śrī vikkiramacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 Āvatu Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Ampar nāṭṭu Ampar tiru mākāḷamuṭaiyār koyil Āṭkoṇ
ṭanāyakar tirunāyaṟṟu kiḻamai tirumaṭaiviḷākat teḻuntaruḷip pukuntu Amutu ceykaikkut tirunāyaṟṟuk kiḻamai Onṟukkut tiruvamutarici Irunāḻikku nellu Aññāḻiyum kariyamutu veñcanattukku nellu nā
ḻiyum Āka nellu Aṟunāḻiyum Ikkoyil śrīkāriyañceyvārkaḷ peṟum citārappaṭi nellile celuttakaṭavitāka Ikkoyilil śrīkāriyañceykiṟa pontaikkuṭaiyān tiruvekampamuṭaiyā
ṉ nīṟaṇintānen Ippaṭi ceytu Ik koyil śrīkāriyañceyvār koṟṟile piṭittu Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ śāśvatikamāka śrīmāheśvarare Ippaṭi ceyvittuk koḷḷak kaṭavār Ippaṭi ceyvittuk �
tār tiruvāṇai tiruviraiyākkali Itu panmāheśvarar rakṣai ....§
Digital edition of SII 36.108 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
